parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: 'setup', test_mode: true } }];
const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: s.store_name, answer: s.store_name, test_mode: true } }];
const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: s.upi_id, answer: s.upi_id, test_mode: true } }];
const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: s.delivery_area, answer: s.delivery_area, test_mode: true } }];
const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: s.operating_hours, answer: s.operating_hours, test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run Save Hours').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const manual = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').includes('manual')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {} ), bootstrap_button_id: manual ? String(manual.id) : '' } }];
const d = $('Extract Bootstrap Button').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.owner_chat_id, button_id: d.bootstrap_button_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {}; const owner = String(s.owner_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT COALESCE(store_id, 0) AS store_id, store_name, owner_whatsapp_number, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) AS onboarding_step FROM public.stores WHERE owner_whatsapp_number = '${owner}' ORDER BY COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: s.manual_message, test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run Manual Preview').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').startsWith('owner_inv_confirm__')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {} ), confirm_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];
const d = $('Extract Manual Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.owner_chat_id, button_id: d.confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run Promo Preview').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').startsWith('owner_promo_confirm__')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {} ), promo_confirm_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];

const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, source_type: 'document', media_filename: 'owner-e2e.xlsx', media_mime_type: 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet', test_file_base64: "", test_file_name: 'owner-e2e.xlsx', test_file_mime_type: 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet', test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run XLSX Preview').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').startsWith('owner_bulk_apply__')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {} ), xlsx_confirm_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];
const d = $('Extract XLSX Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.owner_chat_id, button_id: d.xlsx_confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];

const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {}; const rows = Array.from({ length: 620 }, (_, index) => ({ item_name: s.tag + ' bulk item ' + String(index + 1).padStart(4, '0'), price: 10 + (index % 40), stock: 5 + (index % 9), unit: 'pcs', category: 'Bulk', brand: '' })); return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/mock-bulk-sheet/edit#gid=0', test_sheet_rows: rows, test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run Bulk Sheet Preview').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').startsWith('owner_bulk_apply__')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {} ), bulk_sheet_confirm_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];
const d = $('Extract Bulk Sheet Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.owner_chat_id, button_id: d.bulk_sheet_confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];

const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, source_type: 'image', media_filename: 'good.png', media_mime_type: 'image/png', test_file_base64: "", test_file_name: 'good.png', test_file_mime_type: 'image/png', test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run Good Image Preview').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').startsWith('owner_bulk_apply__')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {} ), good_image_confirm_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];
const d = $('Extract Good Image Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.owner_chat_id, button_id: d.good_image_confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];

const s = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, source_type: 'image', media_filename: 'bad.png', media_mime_type: 'image/png', test_file_base64: "", test_file_name: 'bad.png', test_file_mime_type: 'image/png', test_mode: true } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const seed = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {}; const owner = String(seed.owner_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const tag = String(seed.tag || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `WITH s AS (SELECT '${owner}'::text AS owner_chat_id, '${tag}'::text AS tag), store_row AS (SELECT COALESCE(store_id, 0) AS store_id, COALESCE(store_name, '') AS store_name, COALESCE(upi_id, '') AS upi_id, COALESCE(delivery_area, '') AS delivery_area, COALESCE(operating_hours, '') AS operating_hours FROM public.stores WHERE owner_whatsapp_number = (SELECT owner_chat_id FROM s) ORDER BY COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1) SELECT 'store' AS kind, COALESCE(store_name, '') AS label, COALESCE(upi_id, '') AS val1, COALESCE(delivery_area, '') AS val2, COALESCE(operating_hours, '') AS val3 FROM store_row UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory_tag_count' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS label, '' AS val1, '' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.inventory WHERE item_name ILIKE '%' || (SELECT tag FROM s) || '%' UNION ALL SELECT 'bulk_sheet_inventory_count' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS label, '' AS val1, '' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.inventory WHERE item_name ILIKE (SELECT tag FROM s) || ' bulk item %' UNION ALL SELECT 'promo_tag_count' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS label, '' AS val1, '' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.promotions WHERE COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE '%' || (SELECT tag FROM s) || '%' UNION ALL SELECT 'session_count' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS label, '' AS val1, '' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.owner_operation_sessions WHERE chat_id = (SELECT owner_chat_id FROM s) UNION ALL SELECT 'import_job_count' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS label, '' AS val1, '' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.owner_import_jobs WHERE chat_id = (SELECT owner_chat_id FROM s) UNION ALL SELECT 'import_row_count' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS label, '' AS val1, '' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.owner_import_job_rows WHERE job_id IN (SELECT job_id FROM public.owner_import_jobs WHERE chat_id = (SELECT owner_chat_id FROM s));`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const seed = $('Seed Owner Inputs').first().json || {}; const owner = String(seed.owner_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const tag = String(seed.tag || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `DELETE FROM public.owner_import_job_rows WHERE job_id IN (SELECT job_id FROM public.owner_import_jobs WHERE chat_id = '${owner}'); DELETE FROM public.owner_import_jobs WHERE chat_id = '${owner}'; DELETE FROM public.owner_operation_sessions WHERE chat_id = '${owner}'; DELETE FROM public.promotions WHERE COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE '%' || '${tag}' || '%' OR promo_code ILIKE '%' || UPPER('${tag}') || '%'; DELETE FROM public.inventory WHERE item_name ILIKE '%' || '${tag}' || '%' OR COALESCE(sku, '') ILIKE UPPER('${tag}') || '%'; DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE user_id = ${owner}; DELETE FROM public.carts WHERE user_id = ${owner}; DELETE FROM public.stores WHERE owner_whatsapp_number = '${owner}'; SELECT 'cleanup' AS result;`; })() }}
